stemHtml:
Given the following information, determine the minimum landing distance available for a multi-engined Performance Class B aeroplane operated for Commercial Air Transport.

Defactored landing distance: 2551 ft
Runway surface: paved asphalt
Runway condition: wet (factor 1.15)
Runway slope: 0.5% downslope

The landing distance should be increased by 5% for each 1% downslope.
